name: tackle-ticket
description: Ticket-to-PR workflow plugin with a multi-model review loop.

plugins.name: tackle-ticket
plugins.description: End-to-end ticket workflow: fetch ticket → plan → branch → code + tests → multi-model review loop (Opus + Sonnet + Haiku + Codex) → open PR. Config-driven via /tackle-setup; bundles a caveman-derived terse mode.
